task: UX: '처리 중...' 메시지에 결과 도착 안내 추가 및 Ollama 34초 응답 지연 투명성 개선

governance_bootstrap.summary: Production changes via git commit/push to origin/main + deploy_to_macmini.sh
Single source of truth is origin/main; direct Mac Mini modification prohibited

root_causes: Ollama gemma4 local model takes ~34s for general questions — user sees '처리 중...' and gives up before second result message arrives

changes.description: Changed async ack message from ':thinking_face: 처리 중...' to ':thinking_face: 처리 중... (잠시 기다려주세요 — 결과가 별도 메시지로 도착합니다)' to set correct expectation

verification.name: live agent_run timing test on Mac Mini
verification.command: ssh macmini python3 -c 'run("오늘 날씨 어때?", session_id="test")'
verification.result: elapsed: 34.12s — Ollama responds, result returned correctly

deploy.method: git commit + push to origin/main, then scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh
